user_story: As an HR admin, I want to complete and submit an onboarding checklist pending with me, so that a new hire's onboarding is recorded
acceptance_criteria: Given a checklist has status Pending With Me; When I open its Task and complete the checklist; Then its status changes to Submitted

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter onboarding checklists by status, so that I can see items pending with me versus submitted
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Onboarding Checklist screen; When I select a status such as Pending With Me or Submitted; Then only matching checklists are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter checklists by onboarding type and employee name, so that I can focus on a specific onboarding category or person
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Onboarding Checklist screen; When I select an onboarding type and enter an employee name; Then only matching checklists are shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to see work location, date of joining, position, and timeline for each onboarding, so that I can track onboarding progress
acceptance_criteria: Given checklists are listed; When I view a row; Then I can see employee name, email ID, work location, date of joining, position, timeline, and onboarding type

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to search and reset the onboarding checklist list, so that I can refine or clear my query
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set filter criteria; When I click Search; Then matching records are displayed; And clicking Reset clears the filters
